posts.author: samharland (Samuel Harland)
posts.cookedHtml:
I want to set up either a formula or automation which uses the planned timeline to give me a date based on a percentage in another column.

For example if the planned timeline is 08/04/2025 to 07/02/2025 and the % in the columns if 10% I would like it to return 08/05/2025 as that is 10% into the project.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Which product (CRM/Work Management, etc) and level (Pro/Enterprise) do you have?
